title: ba`al #1167
definition:
1) owner, husband, lord
    1a) owner
    1b) a husband
    1c) citizens, inhabitants
    1d) rulers, lords
    1e) (noun of relationship used to characterise - ie, master of dreams)
    1f) lord (used of foreign gods)
